Function to find the shortest path in a weighted graph
    :param graph: Weighted graph
    :param start: Start node
    :param end: End node
    :return: Shortest path
    """
    # Initialize all distances to INFINTY
    d = {u: float("inf") for u in graph}
    d[start] = 0
    # For each node in the graph
    for u in graph:
        if d[u] == float("inf"):
            for v, w in graph[u]:
                if d[u] + w < d[v]:
                    d[v] = d[u] + w
    # For each node form start to end
    path = []
    while d[end] != float("inf"):
        path.append(end)
        end = d[end] - w
    return path
